message:
fix: resolve issues #49-52 (e2e.sh, completions, packaging, CI)

- e2e.sh: Replace ((VAR++)) with VAR=$((VAR + 1)) to avoid set -e crash
  when counter is 0 (bash arithmetic returns exit 1 for ((0++)))
- e2e_completions.rs: Update assertions for dynamic completions via
  clap_complete::env::Shells (check _clap_complete_br and COMPLETE env
  var instead of static subcommand/flag names)
- packaging: Bump version 0.1.12 → 0.1.13 in Homebrew, Scoop, AUR
  manifests to match Cargo.toml
- ci.yml: Increase test job timeout 20 → 40 minutes to prevent
  intermittent CI failures on slow runners

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ jobs:
   test:
     name: Test Suite
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 20
+    timeout-minutes: 40
     needs: check
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # To install from AUR: yay -S br-bin
 
 pkgname=br-bin
-pkgver=0.1.12
+pkgver=0.1.13
 pkgrel=1
 pkgdesc="Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
 arch=('x86_64' 'aarch64')

@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ class Br < Formula
   desc "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust"
   license "MIT"
-  version "0.1.12"
+  version "0.1.13"
 
   on_macos do
     on_arm do

@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@ log "Artifacts: $ARTIFACTS_DIR"
 for test in "${QUICK_TESTS[@]}"; do
     # Apply filter if specified
     if [[ -n "$FILTER" ]] && [[ ! "$test" =~ $FILTER ]]; then
-        ((SKIPPED++))
+        SKIPPED=$((SKIPPED + 1))
         continue
     fi
 
@@ -121,18 +121,18 @@ for test in "${QUICK_TESTS[@]}"; do
     if [[ "$VERBOSE" -eq 1 ]]; then
         if timeout "$TIMEOUT" cargo test --release --test "$test" -- --nocapture 2>&1; then
             RESULT="pass"
-            ((PASSED++))
+            PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
         else
             RESULT="fail"
-            ((FAILED++))
+            FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
         fi
     else
         if timeout "$TIMEOUT" cargo test --release --test "$test" -- --nocapture >/dev/null 2>&1; then
             RESULT="pass"
-            ((PASSED++))
+            PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
         else
             RESULT="fail"
-            ((FAILED++))
+            FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
         fi
     fi
